engineIntelligence.h2: Renault Scala Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Renault Scala imported to the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK import specialist market data.

cards.altText: Renault Scala K9K engine - diesel 1.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: EGR valve clogging - common on imported diesels adapted to UK fuel standards causing rough idle.
Turbo actuator failure - 110hp variants over 100k miles may experience boost loss or rattling.
Timing chain tensioner wear - high-mileage units can develop cold-start rattle requiring replacement.

cards.altText: Renault Scala HR16DE engine - petrol 1.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - higher-mileage imports may develop rattling requiring component upgrade.
Coolant system leaks - aged water pump or thermostat housing can cause overheating on older units.

cards.altText: Renault Scala K9K engine - diesel 1.5L replacement UK import specialist
knownFailures: DPF regeneration failure - urban-driven imported diesels may experience blocked filters requiring replacement.
Injector wear - high-pressure common rail injectors can degrade after 80k miles causing misfires.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,250-£2,150 (supply only) Estimated from comparable K9K units - actual quotes may vary due to import specification verification.

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel

DPF regeneration issues - blocked filters on urban-driven imported diesels

commonProblems.h2: Renault Scala Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Renault Scala's imported K9K diesel and HR16DE petrol engines dominate UK replacement enquiries, with EGR/DPF adaptation and timing component wear being the most prominent failure patterns. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost comparisons below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your import Scala.

problems.group: Renault Scala K9K EGR Valve Clogging
problems.h4: Renault Scala K9K EGR Valve Clogging - Why Imported Diesels Fail on UK Fuel
problems.affectedModels: Renault Scala Life, Active, Dynamique, Prestige 1.5 dCi (2012-2015, K9K846 & K9K848 imported from India, Eastern Europe, Russia, Middle East)
problems.rootCause: Imported K9K engines calibrated for different fuel standards experience accelerated carbon buildup in EGR valves when running on UK diesel, causing restricted exhaust gas recirculation and rough idle.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace EGR valve assembly; reset ECU adaptation values
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may recur within 12-18 months if fuel adaptation not addressed

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace EGR valve, cooler, associated sensors; UK-spec calibration update
repairOptions.longevity: More durable solution; suitable if engine otherwise healthy under 90k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K9K with UK-spec EGR calibration, upgraded components, bench testing, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage imports; addresses root cause and prevents recurrence

problems.recommendation: On a Renault Scala worth £3,000-£6,000 with over 90k miles, investing in a rebuilt K9K engine with UK-spec EGR calibration often delivers better long-term value than repeated repairs. For lower-mileage examples under 70k miles, specialist EGR cleaning with fuel adaptation may extend service life cost-effectively.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K9K engine prices for your Renault Scala import

problems.group: Renault Scala K9K Timing Chain Stretch
problems.h4: Renault Scala K9K Timing Chain Stretch - Cold-Start Rattle on High-Mileage Imports
problems.affectedModels: Renault Scala all 1.5 dCi variants (2012-2015, K9K846/K9K848/K9K850/K9K852)
problems.rootCause: Timing chain tensioners on high-mileage imported K9K engines can lose hydraulic pressure, allowing chain stretch that causes cold-start rattling and potential valve timing issues if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain tensioner and guides; inspect chain wear; reset service intervals
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if chain shows minimal wear; best done before rattling becomes severe

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K9K with Upgraded Timing Kit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K9K with upgraded tensioner, guides and chain; bench tested; 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended once rattling is audible; prevents catastrophic engine damage and offers peace of mind

problems.recommendation: If your imported Scala's K9K engine is rattling on cold start, do not delay - chain failure can cause catastrophic valve damage. For engines under 80k miles with early symptoms, preventative tensioner replacement may suffice. Beyond 90k miles or with audible rattling, a rebuilt engine with upgraded timing components is the safer, more economical long-term solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for K9K timing chain replacement or rebuilt engine for your Renault Scala

problems.group: Renault Scala HR16DE Timing Chain Tensioner Wear
problems.h4: Renault Scala HR16DE Timing Chain Tensioner Wear - Petrol Import Reliability Note
problems.affectedModels: Renault Scala Life, Active, Dynamique 1.6L Petrol (2012-2015, HR16DE100/HR16DE102)
problems.rootCause: HR16DE petrol engines on higher-mileage imports can experience timing chain tensioner wear, leading to chain slack, rattling noises and potential timing drift if maintenance intervals are missed.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain tensioner and guides; inspect chain; reset service records
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for engines under 90k miles with early symptoms and good maintenance history

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt HR16DE with Upgraded Components
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt HR16DE with upgraded timing kit; bench tested; 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for engines over 90k miles or with audible rattling; prevents catastrophic failure

problems.recommendation: The HR16DE is generally reliable, but imported examples with incomplete service histories warrant caution. If you hear timing chain rattling on your Scala petrol, get a specialist assessment immediately. For engines under 80k miles with good records, tensioner replacement may suffice. Beyond that, a rebuilt unit offers better long-term value and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt HR16DE engine prices for your Renault Scala petrol import

problems.group: Renault Scala K9K Turbo Actuator Failure
problems.h4: Renault Scala K9K Turbo Actuator Failure - Boost Loss on 110hp Imports
problems.affectedModels: Renault Scala Dynamique, Prestige 1.5 dCi 110hp (2014-2015, K9K848/K9K850/K9K852)
problems.rootCause: Turbo actuators on higher-output imported K9K engines can fail due to heat cycling and carbon buildup, causing boost pressure loss, limp mode activation and reduced performance.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace turbo actuator; recalibrate boost mapping; road test
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if turbo core is healthy; may not address underlying wear on high-mileage units

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K9K with Tested/Upgraded Turbo
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K9K with tested or upgraded turbo assembly; bench tested; 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for engines over 100k miles; addresses turbo wear and prevents repeat failures

problems.recommendation: Turbo actuator failure on your 110hp imported Scala is often a symptom of broader turbo wear. If your vehicle has over 100k miles, investing in a rebuilt K9K with a tested or upgraded turbo assembly delivers better value than actuator-only replacement, plus warranty protection against future failures.
problems.cta: Get quotes for K9K turbo replacement or rebuilt engine for your Renault Scala 110hp import

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Renault Scala Import
finalCta.paragraph: Whether your imported Scala suffers from EGR clogging, timing chain wear, or turbo issues, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK import-specialist engineers. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, MoT compliance documentation, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare quotes today and get your grey import back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Renault Scala Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, origin market specification, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Renault Scala and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

faq.h2: Renault Scala Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Renault Scala engine replacement cost in the UK for imports?
items.answer: Used imported Renault Scala engines range £550-£950, while reconditioned K9K diesel units cost £1,250-£2,150 and HR16DE petrol £1,150-£1,850 supply-only, depending on engine code and origin market specification.
keyPoints: K9K846 85hp diesel: £1,250-£1,650 rebuilt supply-only
K9K848 110hp diesel: £1,450-£2,150 rebuilt supply-only
HR16DE petrol variants: £1,150-£1,850 rebuilt supply-only
Specialist fitting adds £650-£1,100 labour depending on location
MoT compliance documentation included with all supplied engines

items.question: What engine codes fit my imported Renault Scala?
items.answer: UK imported Renault Scala vehicles use K9K846/K9K848/K9K850/K9K852 for 1.5L diesel or HR16DE100/HR16DE102/H4Mk for 1.6L petrol - verify origin market, chassis code and emissions specification before ordering replacement.
keyPoints: K9K family: 1.5L turbo diesel, 85hp or 110hp depending on variant
HR16DE family: 1.6L naturally aspirated petrol, 104hp standard output
Origin market affects ECU calibration and emissions hardware compatibility
Cross-compatibility exists with Nissan Sunny/Verse for HR16DE codes
Use our free import compatibility checker with VIN and market details

items.question: Can I use a Nissan Sunny engine in my Renault Scala import?
items.answer: Yes - the Renault Scala shares Nissan's V platform with Sunny and Verse models, so K9K and HR16DE engine codes are cross-compatible but require verification of mounting hardware, ECU adaptation and emissions specifications for UK fitment.
keyPoints: K9K diesel and HR16DE petrol codes shared across V platform vehicles
Mounting points generally compatible but verify origin market hardware
ECU adaptation may be required for UK fuel and emissions standards
Nissan Sunny/Verse donors can offer cost-effective replacement sourcing
Specialist fitting recommended for import specification adaptation
